full_text: Shakib to Avishka Fernando, Bowled!! You give a mini opening for this Bangladesh side and they are gonna turn you upside down in the blink of an eye. This is almost like a home ground for them and Shakib is a master at bowling in such conditions. Bowled 2 dots to Avishka and now fired it in towards middle and leg peg, the foot work is all over the place from the batter and before he could bring his bat down the stumps were in a mess. Plenty of flight and attacking the stumps - simple stuff and great results for Shakib.

full_text: Shakib to Nissanka, Bowled!! No emotions from Shakib, just waves his palm to the sky and stands still. Too good from the legend. Took the pace off completely and got the ball to angle in from wide of the crease, Nissanka was early into his slogsweep (just like Kusal Perera earlier) and lost the plot completely. The ball keeps low and slides enough to kiss midle and off.

short_text: Nasum Ahmed to Kusal Perera, Bowled!! Replaced Taskin Ahmed for this game and he's proving his selection right already i
full_text: Nasum Ahmed to Kusal Perera, Bowled!! Replaced Taskin Ahmed for this game and he's proving his selection right already is Nasum Ahmed. He is absolutely thrilled and is doing a Tahir-like marathon celebration. Floated this up, landed it on a good length and got the ball to grip and spin off the deck to hit the top of off. Kusal Perera was shaping up for a slogsweep and was too early into the shot. Playing across the line on this slow-low track is always gonna be a huge risk and Perera paid the price for it.
